_comment: Tutorial local de fallback. Para editar pelo GitHub, altere support/tutorial.json no repositorio publico.
title: Tutorial completo do DelayEngine
intro: Siga estes passos na ordem. O objetivo e fazer o OBS ou Streamlabs enviar a live para o DelayEngine, e o DelayEngine enviar para a Twitch com controle de delay e video de loading.
introEn: Follow these steps in order. The goal is to have OBS or Streamlabs send the stream to DelayEngine, and DelayEngine send it to Twitch with delay control and a loading video.

steps.title: 1. Salve a key da Twitch
steps.text: Abra o painel da Twitch, copie a chave de transmissao primaria e salve no DelayEngine. Essa chave fica no app, nao no OBS.
steps.textEn: Open the Twitch dashboard, copy the primary stream key and save it in DelayEngine. This key stays in the app, not in OBS.

steps.title: 2. Copie os dados para o OBS
steps.text: Em Configuracoes, use o Servidor do DelayEngine para OBS no campo Servidor do OBS ou Streamlabs. Use a Chave local do OBS no campo Chave. Nao cole servidor e chave juntos.
steps.textEn: In Settings, use DelayEngine's Server for OBS in the OBS or Streamlabs Server field. Use the local OBS Key in the Key field. Do not paste server and key together.

steps.title: 3. Configure o modo Twitch polido
steps.text: Antes de iniciar a transmissao, preencha largura, altura, FPS, bitrate de video, bitrate de audio e aceleracao em hardware. Use os mesmos valores configurados no OBS ou Streamlabs.
steps.textEn: Before starting the stream, set width, height, FPS, video bitrate, audio bitrate and hardware acceleration. Use the same values configured in OBS or Streamlabs.

steps.title: 4. Entenda o conversor
steps.text: O conversor de video usa automaticamente os dados do modo Twitch polido. Assim o loading sai com a mesma resolucao, FPS e bitrate da live, sem precisar preencher duas vezes.
steps.textEn: The video converter automatically uses the polished Twitch mode values. This makes the loading video match the stream resolution, FPS and bitrate without entering the information twice.

steps.title: 5. Inicie a live no OBS
steps.text: No OBS ou Streamlabs, clique para iniciar a transmissao. O DelayEngine deve mostrar que a live local chegou e que a Twitch esta recebendo pelo codificador.
steps.textEn: In OBS or Streamlabs, start streaming. DelayEngine should show that the local stream arrived and Twitch is receiving through the encoder.

steps.title: 6. Prepare o video de loading
steps.text: Abra o conversor, escolha um MP4 ou outro video, escolha a duracao e converta. Se o video for curto, o app repete. Se for longo, corta no tempo escolhido.
steps.textEn: Open the converter, choose an MP4 or another video, select the duration and convert it. If the video is short, the app repeats it. If it is long, the app cuts it to the chosen duration.

steps.title: 7. Escolha o loading ativo
steps.text: Depois da conversao, ative o video que voce quer usar como loading. Esse video aparece quando voce adiciona delay durante a live.
steps.textEn: After conversion, activate the video you want to use as loading. This video appears when you add delay during the stream.

steps.title: 8. Adicione delay
steps.text: Escolha o tempo na barra de delay e clique em Adicionar delay com loading. O publico ve o loading e depois volta para a live com o atraso escolhido.
steps.textEn: Choose the time on the delay bar and click Add delay with loading. Viewers see the loading video and then return to the stream with the selected delay.

steps.title: 9. Volte ao vivo
steps.text: Quando quiser remover o delay manual, clique em Voltar ao vivo. O modo Twitch polido mantem a saida organizada e volta para a latencia ao vivo da forma mais direta.
steps.textEn: When you want to remove manual delay, click Go live. Polished Twitch mode keeps the output organized and returns to live latency directly.

steps.title: 10. Checklist rapido
steps.text: Para uma live redonda, confirme tres pontos: OBS enviando para o servidor local do DelayEngine, key da Twitch salva no app e modo Twitch polido com os mesmos dados tecnicos da sua live.
steps.textEn: For a smooth stream, confirm three points: OBS is sending to DelayEngine's local server, the Twitch key is saved in the app, and polished Twitch mode uses the same technical values as your stream.

steps.title: 11. Configure o controle remoto
steps.text: Com o DelayEngine aberto, use http://127.0.0.1:8080/remote. No OBS, adicione a URL como Dock de navegador personalizado. No Streamlabs, use como fonte de navegador ou janela de controle. No Stream Deck, configure uma acao Abrir URL para esse endereco.
steps.textEn: With DelayEngine open, use http://127.0.0.1:8080/remote. In OBS, add the URL as a Custom Browser Dock. In Streamlabs, use it as a browser source or control window. In Stream Deck, configure an Open URL action for this address.

steps.title: 12. Escolha o modo de transicao ideal
steps.text: Teste os modos de transicao e escolha o que melhor combina com o seu computador e com o player usado pelo publico. Loading curto e loading completo usam o modo Encoded; corte pelo buffer usa o modo Copy e preserva a codificacao recebida do OBS ou Streamlabs. Se um modo nao apresentar o resultado desejado no seu equipamento, selecione outro nas Configuracoes.
steps.textEn: Try the transition modes and choose the one that best matches your computer and the player used by your audience. Short loading and full loading use Encoded mode; buffer cut uses Copy mode and preserves the encoding received from OBS or Streamlabs. If a mode does not deliver the desired result on your equipment, select another one in Settings.
